files.reason: Targets sane (99.9%, chat p99<5s, burn-rate tiers); ADR-026 exists; critical routes match real /api endpoints.
Explicitly forward-looking Draft (order-of-magnitude tiers), not prescriptive infra; PgBouncer/replica path consistent with ADR doctrine.
Valid staging-only fault experiments (Redis/PG-replica/LLM-provider). Replica steps are aspirational but doc frames them as post-F-migration.
GHA db-backup-daily.yml + db-backup-monthly-restore-drill.yml both exist; legacy VPS-cron section clearly marked DEPRECATED.
Provider-agnostic Better Stack config; health response shape (status/checks/version) matches /api/health contract.
deploy-staging + deploy-prod jobs genuinely exist in ci-cd-backend.yml; compose-scp, rollback.sh, TLS, Grafana iframe all current. Uses example.com placeholders (intentional).
Runbook accurate (ci-cd-llm-guard.yml + llm-guard sidecar in prod compose) but curl examples use wrong TLD api.musaium.app.
files.updatePlan: Replace api.musaium.app -> api.musaium.com in §2 and §4 health-check curls (canonical domain is musaium.com/.fr per nginx + .env.production.example). Cosmetic, 2 occurrences.

files.reason: Self-contradicts: line 36 notes _deploy-backend.yml deleted 2026-04-24, yet 8+ secret 'Used by' entries still cite it as consumer.
Pin registry matches workflow usage; removed mobile-dev-inc/action-maestro-cloud properly struck-through with Phase-2 note. Spot-check codeql@v4 + checkout@v6 present.

Header dated 2026-05-20 but body Sprint-3/4 stale: deploy-backend.yml (gone), §2 'missing' Redis/uploads/llm-guard already in prod compose, §4 says 20 migrations (actual 64), SSE/FEATURE_FLAG_STREAMING deprecated.

summary: 7 keep / 3 update / 0 delete. Updates: LLM_GUARD wrong TLD (cosmetic); CI_CD_SECRETS + RELEASE_CHECKLIST both cite dead _deploy-backend.yml/deploy-backend.yml; RELEASE_CHECKLIST also has stale migration count (20 vs 64), resolved compose 'gaps', and deprecated SSE flags.
